title: castanea × neglecta
intro: Castanea × neglecta, also known as the chestnut x hybrid, is a hybrid species resulting from the cross between the Chinese chestnut (Castanea mollissima) and the European chestnut (Castanea sativa). The Castanea × neglecta plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reduced risk of cardiovascular disease, improved cognitive function, and enhanced immune system. Herbal preparations of Castanea × neglecta typically involve the leaves and bark, which can be dried, powdered, and used in teas, capsules, or infusions.
